title: podman run --volume :U option not working from docker-compose.yml
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**
Running rootless podman.

Using the [U option](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-run.1.html#volume-v-source-volume-host-dir-container-dir-options) is working as expected, but not with docker-compose.

I know this option is specific to podman but is there any way for docker-compose to pass it ?

Would you rather recommend using podman-compose ?

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

```yml
version: "3.4"
services:
  healthchecks:
    image: healthchecks/healthchecks:latest
    container_name: healthchecks
    # This is required because the container needs to listen on port 25 and user is not root
    cap_add:
     - CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE
    environment:
       - DB_NAME=/tmp/hc.sqlite
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:42002:8000
    volumes:
      # Z: Only this container can use the volume
      # U: Chown the file to the UID in the container. This gives the container's user permissions to write on the mount.
      # https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-run.1.html#volume-v-source-volume-host-dir-container-dir-options
      - './data:/tmp:Z,U'
    restart: unless-stopped
```

**Describe the results you received:**
Permissions denied, because `U` not taken into account:
`data` created with the uid and gid from my user

**Describe the results you expected:**
`data` created with the uid and gid from the container


**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

I'm using Docker Compose version v2.12.2 (standalone), using Podman API

**Output of `podman version`:**

```

Version:      4.3.0

Go Version:   go1.19.3
Built:        Tue Nov  1 19:04:01 2022

```


**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**


Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

I'm on a physical machine running Alpine Linux Edge

comments.body: I think we needed special handling to make `:Z` work in this case, so I'm not terribly surprised `:U` doesn't work with the Docker-compat endpoints without it. Should not be difficult to add.

It seems docker-compose parses the volume options before communicating with the socket.
And as `U` is podman specific, [our option is ignored](https://github.com/compose-spec/compose-go/blob/9df6287f4d9a5a4083540d86b091dff0c3c6f376/loader/volume.go#L97).

I think I will start using podman-compose instead
